### 894303
**Gumball S02E17 - The Bumpkin**  
TV-Y7-FV 🔒 11:26  
⌛ May 25, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=835928&titleid=894303&mediaid=a729800ab159fb51b8386616c7b601c03b3c297f) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/gumball/the-bumpkin-episode.html
